results.title: RxDB
results.description: RxDB is a JavaScript database designed for building offline-first, real-time applications. It supports various JavaScript runtimes and offers a powerful sync engine for seamless data synchronization between clients and servers.

results.title: RxDB
results.description: RxDB is a local-first, NoSQL database for JavaScript applications that offers reactive subscriptions to state changes and supports real-time replication with various backends.

results.title: HelixDB
results.description: HelixDB is a high-performance, open-source graph-vector database written in Rust, optimized for RAG and AI applications with native support for graph and vector data types.

results.title: RDB
results.description: A Go-implemented Redis RDB parser for secondary development and memory analysis, offering features like memory reporting, RDB to JSON/AOF conversion, and key analysis.

results.title: RavenDB
results.description: RavenDB is a transactional, open-source, document-oriented NoSQL database that stores data in JSON format, offering features like ACID transactions, indexing, and full-text search.

results.title: HelixDB
results.description: HelixDB is a high-performance graph-vector database with its own query language, designed for efficiently traversing and manipulating graph and vector data.

results.title: RavenDB
results.description: RavenDB is an open-source, modern ACID NoSQL database that combines extreme performance with ease-of-use, offering a state-of-the-art web UI and supporting all major platforms.

results.title: HelixDB (llmstxt)
results.description: HelixDB is a powerful database system with a Python SDK, offering features like knowledge graph extraction, RAG support, and efficient data management for various applications.

results.title: GraphDB
results.description: GraphDB is a highly efficient, scalable, and robust graph database (triplestore) with RDF and SPARQL support, offering real-time semantic inferencing, LLM Graph RAG capabilities, and integration with external search applications.

results.title: RDB
results.description: A library for parsing, dumping, and verifying RDB files and values up to version 11.

results.title: RocksDB
results.description: RocksDB is a high-performance embedded key-value store written in C++. This project provides a Rust wrapper for RocksDB, enabling its use in Rust applications.

results.title: HyperDB
results.description: HyperDB is a hyper-fast local vector database optimized for LLM agents, featuring a C++ backend with hardware-accelerated operations and support for document indexing with metadata.

results.title: SurrealDB
results.description: SurrealDB is a native, open-source, multi-model database that unifies relational, document, graph, time-series, vector, search, and geospatial data. It uses a SQL-like query language (SurrealQL) and is built for distributed scalability.

results.title: DocumentDB
results.description: DocumentDB is a MongoDB-compatible, open-source document database built on PostgreSQL, offering seamless CRUD operations on BSON data and supporting advanced workloads like full-text and geospatial search.

results.title: AsterixDB
results.description: AsterixDB is an open-source, distributed, and extensible data management system designed for managing semi-structured data and enabling complex analytical queries.

results.title: Redis RDB CLI
results.description: Redis rdb CLI  : A CLI tool that can parse, filter, split, merge rdb and analyze memory usage offline. It can also sync 2 redis data and allow user define their own sink service to migrate redis data to somewhere.

results.title: ArangoDB
results.description: ArangoDB is a scalable multi-model database system that supports graph, document, and key/value data models with a single query language and integrated search engine.

results.title: Super
results.description: SuperDB is an analytics database that supports relational tables and JSON equally, excelling in data wrangling and offering a unified compute engine for structured and semi-structured data.

results.title: OpenVDB
results.description: OpenVDB is a C++ library for the efficient storage and manipulation of sparse volumetric data, originally developed at DreamWorks Animation.

results.title: Sharing GRDB
results.description: SharingGRDB is a fast, lightweight replacement for SwiftData, powered by SQLite and GRDB, offering a way to manage data from iOS 13 onwards.

results.title: DuckDB
results.description: DuckDB is a high-performance analytical database system designed for speed, reliability, portability, and ease of use, offering a rich SQL dialect with advanced features and multiple client integrations.

results.title: HyperDB
results.description: HyperDB is a database built for peer-to-peer (P2P) and local indexing, supporting both Hyperbee for P2P and RocksDB for local-only storage.

results.title: GyverDB
results.description: GyverDB is a simple key-value database for Arduino, supporting various data types, fast access, and automatic flash storage on ESP8266/ESP32.

results.title: RocksDB
results.description: A library that provides an embeddable, persistent key-value store for fast storage.

results.title: YDB
results.description: YDB is an open-source Distributed SQL Database combining high availability, scalability, strict consistency, and ACID transactions for demanding OLTP workloads.

results.title: RxDataSources
results.description: RxDataSources simplifies binding complex, sectioned data to UITableView and UICollectionView with RxCocoa, providing efficient diffing algorithms and animated updates for changes.

results.title: DuckDB
results.description: DuckDB is an in-process SQL database system designed for analytical workloads, offering extensive support for various data types, file formats, and client APIs for efficient data analysis.

results.title: CaskDB
results.description: CaskDB is a key-value database engine based on the Bitcask model, supporting persistent storage for strings, lists, hashes, sets, and Zsets with fast write speeds and stable performance.

results.title: ASDB - Any Source Database
results.description: ASDB is a virtual table wrapper that allows Any Source Database to be used with SQLite, enabling flexible data integration.

results.title: LiteDB
results.description: LiteDB is a simple, fast, and lightweight embedded .NET NoSQL document database that stores data as JSON-like documents in a single file.
